An urn contain 10 white and 3 black balls, while another urn contains 3 white and 5 black balls. Two balls are drawn from the first urn and put into the second urn and then a ball is drawn from the latter. What is the probability that it is a white ball? A die is drawn thrice. A success is ‘getting 1 or 6’ on a toss. Find mean and variance of the number of successes.
